questions.question: Cupping therapy ka prachinatam (oldest) roop kis sabhyata (civilization) mein milta hai?
questions.explanation: Cupping therapy ka sabse purana record Ancient Egypt mein milta hai, Ebers Papyrus mein iska zikr hai.

questions.question: Cupping therapy mein 'cup' ka primary function kya hai?
questions.explanation: Cupping therapy mein cup skin par negative pressure ya suction create karta hai.

questions.question: Cupping ka ek common benefit kya hai?
questions.explanation: Cupping therapy muscles ko relax karne aur stiffness kam karne mein madad karta hai.

questions.question: Cupping therapy ko 'Hijamah' kis culture mein kaha jata hai?
questions.explanation: Unani medicine aur Islamic traditions mein cupping ko 'Hijamah' ke naam se jaana jaata hai.

questions.question: Cupping therapy ka ek mukhya (main) therapeutic principle kya hai?
questions.explanation: Cupping therapy skin par suction create karke local blood circulation ko stimulate karta hai.

questions.question: Cupping therapy ke dauran skin par jo circular marks aate hain, unhe kya kehte hain?
questions.explanation: Cupping ke baad skin par jo gol nishan aate hain, wo suction ki wajah se capillaries ke rupture hone se bante hain, jinhe bruises ya ecchymosis kehte hain.

questions.question: Modern cupping therapy mein kaun se materials ke cups commonly use hote hain?
questions.explanation: Aajkal plastic, silicone aur glass cups sabse zyada use hote hain unki convenience aur safety ke liye.

questions.question: Cupping therapy kis tarah ke pain mein relief dene ke liye jaana jaata hai?
questions.explanation: Cupping therapy especially muscles aur joints se related pain (musculoskeletal pain) mein effective mana jaata hai.

questions.question: Cupping therapy kis system ki energy flow ko balance karne mein madad karta hai, Traditional Chinese Medicine (TCM) ke अनुसार?
questions.explanation: TCM mein cupping ko 'Qi' (body ki vital energy) aur blood ke flow ko regulate aur balance karne ke liye use kiya jaata hai.

questions.question: Cupping therapy ka ek potential side effect kya ho sakta hai?
questions.explanation: Cupping ke baad skin par jo marks aate hain, wo temporary discoloration hote hain jo kuch dino mein theek ho jaate hain.

questions.question: Cupping therapy ke dauran cups ko skin par kitni der tak rakha ja sakta hai, generally?
questions.explanation: Generally, cupping sessions mein cups ko 5 se 15 minutes tak skin par rakha jaata hai, client ki condition aur cupping type par depend karta hai.

questions.question: Cupping therapy primarily kis body part par apply kiya jaata hai?
questions.explanation: Cupping therapy commonly back, shoulders, neck, aur limbs jaise bade, fleshy areas par apply kiya jaata hai.

questions.question: Cupping therapy ko kisliye 'reverse massage' bhi kaha jaata hai?

options.A: Kyuki isme skin ko push kiya jaata hai
options.B: Kyuki isme skin ko pull (suction) kiya jaata hai
options.C: Kyuki isme hands use nahi hote
options.D: Kyuki isme oil use nahi hota

questions.explanation: Traditional massage mein pressure apply karke tissues ko push kiya jaata hai, jabki cupping mein negative pressure se tissues ko upar ki taraf pull kiya jaata hai, isliye ise 'reverse massage' kehte hain.

questions.question: Cupping therapy ka ek important goal kya hai body mein?

options.B: Toxins ko surface par pull karna

questions.explanation: Cupping therapy ka ek theory hai ki yeh stagnant blood aur toxins ko deep tissues se surface par pull karta hai, jisse body ki natural healing process activate hoti hai.

questions.question: Cupping therapy mein kaun sa element heat generate karne ke liye use hota tha, prachin kaal mein?
questions.explanation: Fire cupping ek traditional method hai jisme cup ke andar flame use karke oxygen jalayi jaati hai aur vacuum create kiya jaata hai.

questions.question: Cupping therapy kis tarah ke stress ko relieve karne mein faydemand ho sakta hai?
questions.explanation: Cupping therapy muscle relaxation aur circulation improve karke physical stress ko kam karta hai, aur relaxation promote karke emotional stress mein bhi relief de sakta hai.

questions.question: Cupping therapy ka adhunik (modern) scientific explanation kya hai?

options.A: It directly removes viruses from the body.
options.B: It creates micro-trauma, triggering a local inflammatory response and increased blood flow.

questions.explanation: Scientifically, cupping skin aur underlying tissues mein micro-trauma create karta hai, jisse body ka immune response activate hota hai, blood flow badhta hai aur healing promote hoti hai.

questions.question: Cupping therapy ke kitne mukhya (main) types hain?
questions.explanation: Cupping therapy ke do mukhya types hain: Dry Cupping aur Wet Cupping (Hijamah).

questions.question: Kis type ki cupping mein skin ko puncture kiya jaata hai?
questions.explanation: Wet cupping (Hijamah) mein cups lagane se pehle skin par chhote incisions ya punctures kiye jaate hain.

questions.question: Fire cupping mein vacuum kaise create hota hai?
questions.explanation: Fire cupping mein ek cotton ball ko alcohol mein dip karke flame se jalaya jaata hai aur cup ke andar quickly ghuma kar bahar nikal liya jaata hai, jisse cup ke andar ki oxygen jal jaati hai aur vacuum banta hai.

questions.question: Plastic cups ke saath vacuum create karne ke liye kya use hota hai?
questions.explanation: Plastic cupping sets mein cups ke saath ek hand pump aata hai jisse vacuum create kiya jaata hai.

questions.question: Silicon cups ko kaise use kiya jaata hai vacuum create karne ke liye?
questions.explanation: Silicon cups flexible hote hain, unhe squeeze karke skin par rakha jaata hai, jisse unke release hone par vacuum banta hai.

questions.question: Gliding cupping ke liye skin par kya apply karna zaroori hai?
questions.explanation: Gliding cupping mein cups ko skin par move kiya jaata hai, iske liye skin par oil ya lotion lagana zaroori hai taaki cups smoothly glide kar saken.

questions.question: Flash cupping mein cups ko skin par kitni der tak rakha jaata hai?

options.B: Bahut kam samay ke liye (seconds mein)

questions.explanation: Flash cupping mein cups ko baar-baar quickly lagaya aur hataya jaata hai, kuch seconds ke liye.

questions.question: Glass cups ko vacuum create karne ke liye kaun sa method commonly use hota hai?
questions.explanation: Glass cups traditionally fire cupping ke liye use hote hain.

questions.question: Wet cupping mein use hone wale blades ya lancets kaise hone chahiye?
questions.explanation: Infection se bachne ke liye wet cupping mein hamesha sterile aur disposable blades ya lancets hi use karne chahiye.

questions.question: Cupping therapy ke liye kaun sa oil sabse zyada use hota hai gliding purpose ke liye?
questions.explanation: Olive oil cupping ke liye ek popular choice hai kyuki yeh skin friendly hai aur cups ko smoothly glide karne mein madad karta hai.

questions.question: Agar client ko heat sensitivity hai, toh kaun sa cupping method avoid karna chahiye?
questions.explanation: Fire cupping mein heat involved hoti hai, isliye heat sensitive clients ke liye yeh avoid karna chahiye.

questions.question: Mukhya (main) purpose of using an alcohol swab before fire cupping is?

options.B: To create a flame for vacuum

questions.explanation: Fire cupping mein alcohol swab ko jalakar cup ke andar vacuum create kiya jaata hai.

questions.question: Cupping set mein suction level adjust karne ke liye kya mechanism hota hai?

options.B: Pump pistol ko zyada ya kam pull karke
options.D: Cup ke material ko change karke

questions.explanation: Plastic cupping sets mein pump pistol ko kitni baar pull kiya jaata hai, usse suction ka level adjust hota hai.

questions.question: Stationary cupping mein cups ko skin par kaise rakha jaata hai?
questions.explanation: Stationary cupping mein cups ko ek particular area par laga kar kuch der ke liye fixed rakha jaata hai.

questions.question: Agar cup vacuum create karne ke baad skin par hold nahi ho raha, toh kya problem ho sakti hai?

options.B: Skin par sufficient oil nahi hai
options.C: Vacuum insufficient hai ya cup damaged hai
options.D: Patient ki skin bahut tight hai

questions.explanation: Agar cup skin par hold nahi ho raha, toh ya toh vacuum sufficient nahi bana ya cup mein koi crack ya damage hai jisse air leak ho rahi hai.

questions.question: Electric cupping machines ka kya advantage hai?

options.B: Suction level ko precisely control kiya ja sakta hai

questions.explanation: Electric cupping machines mein suction level ko digital controls se precisely adjust kiya ja sakta hai, jo manual methods mein mushkil hai.

questions.question: Cupping therapy mein 'magnetic cups' ka kya additional benefit hota hai?
questions.explanation: Magnetic cups mein chhote magnets hote hain jo cupping ke saath magnetic field therapy ka benefit bhi dete hain, jisse pain relief aur healing promote hoti hai.

questions.question: Skin ki kaun si layer cupping ke dauran directly affected hoti hai?
questions.explanation: Cupping se negative pressure create hota hai jo skin ki teeno layers (epidermis, dermis, hypodermis) ko pull karta hai, aur underlying muscles ko bhi affect karta hai.

questions.question: Cupping therapy ka ek mukhya (main) effect blood vessels par kya hota hai?
questions.explanation: Cupping se negative pressure aur local irritation hota hai, jisse blood vessels fail jaati hain (vasodilation) aur blood flow badhta hai.

questions.question: Muscles mein tension aur stiffness ke liye cupping kaise kaam karta hai?

options.A: Muscles ko stretch karke aur blood flow badhakar

questions.explanation: Cupping muscles ko upar ki taraf pull karta hai, unhe stretch karta hai aur us area mein blood circulation badhata hai, jisse tension aur stiffness kam hoti hai.

questions.question: Cupping marks (bruises) kis wajah se bante hain?
questions.explanation: Cupping ke dauran suction ki wajah se skin ke neeche ki chhote blood vessels (capillaries) rupture ho jaati hain, jisse blood leak hokar skin ke neeche jama ho jaata hai aur marks bante hain.

questions.question: Lymphatic system par cupping ka kya effect hota hai?

options.A: Lymphatic flow ko kam karta hai
options.B: Lymphatic flow ko stimulate karta hai
options.C: Lymphatic nodes ko shrink karta hai
options.D: Lymphatic system par koi effect nahi hota

questions.explanation: Cupping negative pressure se lymphatic vessels ko stimulate karta hai, jisse lymphatic fluid ka flow badhta hai aur waste products ko remove karne mein madad milti hai.

questions.question: Pain perception ko kam karne mein cupping kaise madad karta hai?

options.B: Endorphins release karke aur Gate Control Theory ke through

questions.explanation: Cupping pain Gate Control Theory ke through kaam karta hai, jisme non-painful input (suction) pain signals ko block karta hai, aur endorphins (natural painkillers) release karta hai.

questions.question: Connective tissue (fascia) par cupping ka kya asar hota hai?

options.B: Fascia ko release aur stretch karta hai
options.D: Fascia par koi asar nahi hota

questions.explanation: Cupping fascia ko upar ki taraf pull karta hai, usse adhesion (chipkaav) ko todta hai aur usse release aur stretch karta hai, jisse flexibility badhti hai.

questions.question: Cupping therapy ke dauran skin ka colour dark red ya purple kyu ho jaata hai?

options.B: Stagnant blood aur toxins ke surface par aane se

questions.explanation: Dark marks stagnant blood, cellular debris aur toxins ke surface par pull hone ko indicate karte hain. Yeh body ke healing process ka hissa hai.

questions.question: Inflammation ko kam karne mein cupping kaise madad karta hai?

options.B: Local blood flow badhakar aur inflammatory mediators ko disperse karke

questions.explanation: Cupping local blood flow ko badhakar aur inflammatory mediators ko disperse karke inflammation ko kam karne mein madad karta hai, jisse healing process fast hoti hai.

questions.question: Cupping therapy ka effect nervous system par kya hota hai?

options.B: Parasympathetic nervous system ko activate karta hai
options.C: Sympathetic nervous system ko overstimulate karta hai

questions.explanation: Cupping therapy relaxation promote karta hai aur parasympathetic nervous system (rest and digest) ko activate karta hai, jisse stress kam hota hai aur healing badhti hai.

questions.question: Skin ki elasticity par cupping ka kya asar hota hai?

options.C: Elasticity par koi asar nahi hota
options.D: Skin ko permanent stretch karta hai

questions.explanation: Cupping se blood flow badhta hai aur collagen production stimulate ho sakta hai, jisse skin ki elasticity improve ho sakti hai.

questions.question: Agar client ki skin bahut thin ya fragile hai, toh cupping pressure kaisa hona chahiye?
questions.explanation: Thin ya fragile skin par bahut light pressure use karna chahiye taaki excessive bruising ya skin damage na ho.

questions.question: Cupping ke dauran agar patient ko extreme pain ho, toh kya karna chahiye?

options.B: Cups ko immediately remove karna chahiye

questions.explanation: Agar patient ko extreme pain ho, toh cups ko turant remove karna chahiye. Patient comfort sabse important hai.

questions.question: Myofascial release mein cupping kaise madad karta hai?
questions.explanation: Cupping negative pressure se fascia aur muscles ke beech ke adhesions (chipkaav) ko lift aur separate karta hai, jisse myofascial release hota hai aur range of motion improve hoti hai.

questions.question: Cupping therapy ka digestive system par kya indirect effect ho sakta hai?
questions.explanation: Stress reduction aur parasympathetic nervous system activation se digestion improve ho sakta hai, cupping directly digestive organs par kaam nahi karta.

questions.question: Agar client ko blood thinners (khoon patla karne wali dawai) par hai, toh cupping mein kya risk hai?

options.B: Excessive bruising aur bleeding ka risk

questions.explanation: Blood thinners lene wale clients mein cupping se excessive bruising aur bleeding ka risk zyada hota hai, isliye cupping contraindicated ho sakta hai ya bahut precaution ke saath karna chahiye.

questions.question: Cupping therapy ke liye client assessment mein sabse pehle kya karna chahiye?

options.C: Client ko cupping ke fayde batana

questions.explanation: Client ki medical history lena sabse pehla step hai taaki koi contraindication identify ho sake.

questions.question: Kon si condition cupping therapy ke liye ek absolute contraindication hai?
questions.explanation: Open wounds, cuts, rashes ya any other skin lesions par cupping nahi karna chahiye kyuki isse infection ka risk badh jaata hai.

questions.question: Pregnancy ke dauran cupping ke liye kya precaution leni chahiye?

options.B: Pregnancy mein cupping completely avoid karna chahiye
options.C: Only lower back par kar sakte hain
options.D: First trimester mein avoid karein, baad mein light cupping kar sakte hain (doctor se consult karke)

questions.explanation: Pregnancy mein especially first trimester mein cupping avoid karna chahiye. Baad ke trimesters mein bhi, doctor ki salah aur bahut light pressure ke saath hi karna chahiye, aur abdomen/lower back jaise areas avoid karne chahiye.

questions.question: Agar client ko bleeding disorder hai (jaise Hemophilia), toh cupping karna chahiye ya nahi?

options.C: Sirf dry cupping kar sakte hain
options.D: Doctor ki permission se kar sakte hain

questions.explanation: Bleeding disorders mein cupping bilkul contraindicated hai kyuki isse excessive bleeding ya bruising ho sakta hai.

questions.question: Diabetes ke patient ke liye cupping karte samay kya precaution leni chahiye?

options.C: Skin integrity aur sensation ka dhyan rakhein, infection ka risk zyada hota hai
options.D: Insulin injection sites par cupping karna chahiye

questions.explanation: Diabetic patients mein skin fragile ho sakti hai aur healing slow hoti hai. Sensation loss bhi ho sakta hai. Isliye infection aur skin damage se bachne ke liye extra precaution leni chahiye.

questions.question: Client intake form mein kaun si information hona zaroori hai?
questions.explanation: Medical history, allergies aur current medications cupping therapy ke liye critical information hai taaki contraindications identify ho saken.

questions.question: Consent form sign karwana kyu zaroori hai?

options.B: Client ko procedure, risks aur benefits ke baare mein inform karne aur unki permission lene ke liye

questions.explanation: Consent form client ko cupping therapy ke baare mein poori jaankari deta hai aur unki informed permission leta hai, jo legal aur ethical practice ke liye zaroori hai.

questions.question: Agar client ko fever hai, toh cupping karna chahiye ya nahi?

options.C: Sirf forehead par cupping kar sakte hain

questions.explanation: Fever body mein infection ya inflammation ka sign ho sakta hai. Is condition mein cupping avoid karna chahiye.

questions.question: Varicose veins wale area par cupping karte samay kya dhyan rakhna chahiye?

options.B: Directly varicose veins par cupping avoid karna chahiye
options.C: Zyada der tak cups rakhne chahiye

questions.explanation: Varicose veins par direct cupping se damage ho sakta hai ya condition bigad sakti hai. Is area ko avoid karna chahiye.

questions.question: Client assessment mein palpation ka kya role hai?

options.B: Muscle tension, trigger points aur skin condition assess karna
options.D: Client ka heart rate check karna

questions.explanation: Palpation se therapist muscle tension, trigger points, fascia restrictions aur skin ki general condition ko feel karke cupping ke liye suitable areas identify karta hai.

questions.question: Agar client ko blood clotting disorder hai, toh wet cupping karna chahiye ya nahi?
questions.explanation: Blood clotting disorder (coagulopathy) mein wet cupping (jisme skin ko puncture kiya jaata hai) bilkul contraindicated hai kyuki isse severe bleeding ho sakti hai.

questions.question: Sunburn wali skin par cupping karna safe hai?

options.B: Nahi, sunburned skin sensitive hoti hai aur damage ho sakta hai

questions.explanation: Sunburned skin inflamed aur sensitive hoti hai. Cupping se further irritation aur damage ho sakta hai, isliye avoid karna chahiye.

questions.question: Agar client ko ek acute injury hai (nayi chot) jisme swelling aur heat hai, toh cupping kaise karna chahiye?

options.B: Injury ke aas-paas light cupping (avoid direct injury)

questions.explanation: Acute injury par direct high suction cupping se inflammation badh sakti hai. Injury ke aas-paas light cupping circulation improve kar sakta hai, lekin direct injury par nahi karna chahiye.

questions.question: Skin infections (jaise fungal infection) wale area par cupping karna kaisa hai?

options.B: Infection fail sakta hai, avoid karna chahiye
options.D: Sirf dry cupping kar sakte hain

questions.explanation: Skin infections wale area par cupping karne se infection fail sakta hai ya condition bigad sakti hai. Isliye avoid karna chahiye.

questions.question: Client ko cupping ke baad hone wale marks ke baare mein pehle se batana kyu important hai?

options.B: Unki expectations manage karne aur unhe informed rakhne ke liye

questions.explanation: Client ko cupping marks ke baare mein pehle se batana zaroori hai taaki unhe pata ho ki kya expect karna hai aur wo ghabrayein nahi. Yeh informed consent ka hissa bhi hai.

questions.question: Agar client ko heart condition hai, toh cupping ke dauran kya precaution leni chahiye?

options.B: Chest par cupping avoid karna chahiye aur light pressure use karna chahiye
options.C: Zyada der tak cupping karna chahiye

questions.explanation: Serious heart conditions mein cupping avoid karna chahiye. Agar karna bhi ho toh chest area avoid karein aur bahut light suction use karein, doctor ki salah se.

questions.question: Neurological conditions (jaise Epilepsy) mein cupping ke liye kya consideration hai?

options.A: Cupping se seizures theek ho jaate hain
options.B: Seizure trigger hone ka risk ho sakta hai, precaution leni chahiye
options.C: Sirf head par cupping karna chahiye

questions.explanation: Epilepsy jaise neurological conditions mein cupping se seizures trigger hone ka risk ho sakta hai. Client ki medical history aur doctor ki salah lena crucial hai. Generally, aise cases mein cupping avoid kiya jaata hai ya bahut caution ke saath kiya jaata hai.

questions.question: Cupping therapy shuru karne se pehle client ki skin ko kaise prepare karna chahiye?

options.B: Skin ko clean aur dry karna, aur agar gliding cupping hai toh oil apply karna

questions.explanation: Skin ko clean aur dry karna hygiene ke liye zaroori hai. Gliding cupping ke liye oil ya lotion lagana chahiye taaki cups smoothly move kar saken.

questions.question: Static cupping mein cups ko kitni der tak ek hi jagah par rakha jaata hai?

options.D: Jab tak client ko dard na ho

questions.explanation: Static cupping mein cups ko generally 5 se 15 minutes tak ek hi spot par rakha jaata hai.

questions.question: Gliding cupping mein cups ko kaise move kiya jaata hai?

options.D: Cups ko lift karke dobara lagate hain

questions.explanation: Gliding cupping mein cups ko skin par oil ya lotion lagakar linear strokes mein move kiya jaata hai.

questions.question: Flash cupping ka primary purpose kya hai?
questions.explanation: Flash cupping mein cups ko baar-baar quickly lagaya aur hataya jaata hai, jisse skin ko light stimulation milti hai aur circulation boost hota hai bina zyada marks chode.

questions.question: Kis body area par cupping karte samay special care leni chahiye kyuki wahan bones surface ke kareeb hoti hain?
questions.explanation: Shins, ribs, collarbones jaise bony areas par cupping karte samay bahut light suction use karna chahiye ya avoid karna chahiye kyuki yahan ample muscle tissue nahi hota.

questions.question: Cupping pressure kitna hona chahiye, yeh kaise determine karte hain?

options.B: Client ke comfort level aur skin reaction ke hisab se
options.C: Har client ke liye same pressure
options.D: Sirf cup ke size par depend karta hai

questions.explanation: Pressure client ke comfort level, skin thickness, aur treatment goal ke hisab se adjust karna chahiye. Kabhi bhi itna pressure nahi hona chahiye ki client ko unbearable pain ho.

questions.question: Agar cupping ke dauran client ko dizziness ya nausea feel ho, toh kya karna chahiye?

options.A: Unhe aur zyada der letne ko kahein
options.B: Cups remove karein, client ko rest dein aur pani pilayein

questions.explanation: Dizziness ya nausea vasovagal reaction ho sakta hai. Cups remove karein, client ko supine position mein rest dein, fresh air dein aur pani pilayein.

questions.question: Cupping therapy se pehle skin par massage karne ka kya fayda hai?

options.A: Cupping ka effect kam ho jaata hai
options.B: Blood flow badhta hai aur muscles relax hote hain, jisse cupping zyada effective hota hai
options.D: Cups aasani se chipak jaate hain

questions.explanation: Massage se muscles warm up hote hain aur blood flow badhta hai, jisse cupping ke results aur better ho sakte hain.

questions.question: Wet cupping (Hijamah) ke liye skin par incisions kitne deep hone chahiye?

options.D: Jitna zyada blood nikle utna deep

questions.explanation: Wet cupping mein incisions bahut superficial hone chahiye, sirf epidermis tak, taaki blood flow ho lekin deep tissue damage ya scarring na ho.

questions.question: Cellulite reduction ke liye kaun sa cupping technique zyada effective mana jaata hai?
questions.explanation: Cellulite reduction ke liye gliding cupping, especially silicone cups ke saath, lymphatic drainage aur blood circulation ko improve karke faydemand mana jaata hai.

questions.question: Facial cupping ke liye kaun se cups use hote hain?
questions.explanation: Facial cupping ke liye small aur soft silicone cups use hote hain kyuki face ki skin delicate hoti hai aur light suction ki zaroorat hoti hai.

questions.question: Agar cupping ke baad skin par blisters aa jayein, toh kya karna chahiye?

options.A: Blisters ko pop kar dena chahiye
options.B: Blisters ko cover karein aur client ko medical attention ke liye advise karein
options.D: Next session mein zyada pressure use karna chahiye

questions.explanation: Blisters excessive suction ya prolonged cupping ki wajah se ho sakte hain. Unhe pop nahi karna chahiye. Sterile dressing lagakar client ko doctor ko dikhane ki salah deni chahiye.

questions.question: Cupping session ki frequency kitni honi chahiye?
questions.explanation: Cupping session ki frequency client ki condition aur marks ke heal hone par depend karti hai. Generally, hafte mein 1-2 baar ya jab marks fade ho jayein tab repeat kar sakte hain.

questions.question: Cupping karte samay kis direction mein cups ko move karna chahiye (gliding cupping mein)?

options.A: Towards heart (lymphatic flow ki direction mein)

questions.explanation: Gliding cupping mein cups ko lymphatic flow ki direction mein, yaani heart ki taraf move karna chahiye, jisse lymphatic drainage aur detoxification optimize ho.

questions.question: Cupping therapy ke baad client ko kya advise karna chahiye, immediately?

options.A: Bahut zyada physical activity karne ko
options.B: Hydrated rehne aur rest karne ko

questions.explanation: Cupping ke baad client ko hydrated rehne, rest karne aur tight kapde na pehne ki advise deni chahiye. Hot showers aur strenuous activity avoid karni chahiye.

questions.question: Agar client ko cupping ke dauran cold ya shivers feel ho, toh kya karna chahiye?

options.B: Cups remove karein, client ko cover karein aur warmth provide karein

questions.explanation: Cold ya shivers body ke temperature regulation mein disturbance ya shock ka sign ho sakte hain. Cups remove karein aur client ko garam rakhein.

questions.question: Cupping therapy ka ek session generally kitni der tak chalta hai?
questions.explanation: Ek typical cupping session, preparation aur aftercare ke saath, generally 20-30 minutes tak chalta hai, depending on the area and technique.

questions.question: Hygiene aur sanitation cupping therapy mein kyu critical hain?

options.B: Infection ke spread ko rokne ke liye
options.C: Client ko impress karne ke liye
options.D: Products ko preserve karne ke liye

questions.explanation: Hygiene aur sanitation infection ke spread ko rokne aur client ki safety ensure karne ke liye sabse important hain.

questions.question: Reusable cupping cups ko har use ke baad kaise clean karna chahiye?

options.B: Soap aur pani se dhokar, phir disinfectant se sanitize karna

questions.explanation: Reusable cups ko har use ke baad achhe se soap aur pani se dhokar, phir high-level disinfectant se sanitize karna zaroori hai.

questions.question: Wet cupping ke baad blood-stained waste ko kaise dispose karna chahiye?
questions.explanation: Blood-stained waste ko biohazard waste (biomedical waste) ke roop mein dispose karna chahiye, strict guidelines follow karte hue.

questions.question: Therapist ko cupping karte samay kaun se personal protective equipment (PPE) pehenne chahiye?

options.B: Gloves aur, agar wet cupping hai, toh face shield/goggles

questions.explanation: Therapist ko hamesha gloves pehenne chahiye. Wet cupping mein blood exposure ka risk hota hai, isliye face shield ya goggles bhi zaroori hain.

questions.question: Client ko cupping marks ki aftercare ke liye kya advise karna chahiye?

options.B: Marks ko chhod dena, unhe naturally fade hone dena, aur hydrate rehna

questions.explanation: Cupping marks naturally fade ho jaate hain. Client ko hydrated rehne, skin ko moisturize karne aur direct sun exposure se bachne ki advise deni chahiye.

questions.question: Agar client ko cupping ke baad excessive soreness ya pain ho, toh kya karna chahiye?

options.B: Cold compress ya arnica cream lagane ki salah dein

questions.explanation: Excessive soreness ke liye cold compress ya arnica cream jaise topical remedies beneficial ho sakte hain. Agar pain severe ho toh doctor se consult karne ki salah deni chahiye.

questions.question: Cupping therapy ke baad kitne samay tak hot shower ya swimming avoid karna chahiye?
questions.explanation: Cupping ke baad skin pores open hote hain aur infection ka risk hota hai. Isliye 24-48 ghante tak hot shower, swimming pool ya sauna avoid karna chahiye.

questions.question: Professional ethics mein 'client confidentiality' ka kya matlab hai?

options.A: Client ki personal details sabko batana
options.B: Client ki personal aur medical information ko secret rakhna
options.C: Client se koi baat na karna

questions.explanation: Client confidentiality ka matlab hai ki client ki personal aur medical information ko secret rakha jaye aur bina unki permission ke kisi ke saath share na kiya jaye.

questions.question: Agar client cupping ke dauran uncomfortable feel kare, toh therapist ko kya karna chahiye?

options.B: Unki baat sunna aur accordingly adjustment karna (pressure kam karna, cups remove karna)

questions.explanation: Therapist ko hamesha client ke comfort level ka dhyan rakhna chahiye aur unki feedback ke according treatment ko adjust karna chahiye.

questions.question: Cross-contamination ko rokne ke liye kya karna zaroori hai?

options.A: Ek hi towel sab clients ke liye use karna
options.B: Har client ke liye fresh, clean linen aur sterilized equipment use karna

questions.explanation: Cross-contamination se bachne ke liye har client ke liye fresh linen aur sterilized equipment use karna bahut zaroori hai.

questions.question: Therapist ki professional boundary kya honi chahiye?

options.A: Client ke personal life mein interfere karna
options.B: Client ke saath professional relationship maintain karna, personal nahi
options.D: Client ko apne ghar invite karna

questions.explanation: Professional boundary ka matlab hai ki therapist aur client ke beech ek professional relationship maintain ho, jisme client ki safety aur trust sabse upar ho, aur personal relationships avoid kiye jayein.

questions.question: Agar client ko cupping ke baad itching ho, toh kya advise karna chahiye?

options.B: Light moisturizer lagana ya doctor se consult karna agar severe ho

questions.explanation: Light itching common ho sakti hai. Moisturizer lagana helpful ho sakta hai. Agar itching severe ho ya rash develop ho, toh medical advice leni chahiye.

questions.question: Cupping therapy provider ko kis type ki insurance cover leni chahiye?
questions.explanation: Professional liability insurance (malpractice insurance) therapist ko kisi bhi claims ya lawsuits se protect karta hai jo treatment ke dauran ho sakti hain.

questions.question: Cupping ke dauran agar client ko faintness feel ho, toh kya karna chahiye?

options.B: Cups remove karein, unhe flat letayein, legs elevated karein, aur fresh air dein

questions.explanation: Faintness (vasovagal syncope) hone par cups remove karein, client ko supine position mein rakhein aur legs elevate karein taaki brain mein blood flow badhe. Fresh air aur pani bhi de sakte hain.

questions.question: Cupping therapy ke baare mein galat information spread karna kaisa hai?
questions.explanation: Professional ethics ke hisab se, therapist ko hamesha accurate aur honest information provide karni chahiye. Galat information spread karna unethical aur unprofessional hai.

questions.question: Agar client ko cupping ke baad koi serious adverse reaction ho, toh therapist ki kya responsibility hai?

options.B: Unhe medical attention ke liye refer karna aur incident ko document karna
options.C: Unhe dobara cupping ke liye bulana

questions.explanation: Kisi bhi serious adverse reaction ki sthiti mein, therapist ki responsibility hai ki wo client ko immediately medical attention ke liye refer karein aur poore incident ko thoroughly document karein.
